_comment: This is iteration-feedback.json AFTER Step 2.5 auto-inferred user_decisions

gaps.detail: WebSocket 实时通信延迟超过 5 秒，医生端回复体验极差
删除成功后无确认反馈，用户不确定是否删除成功
功能简陋，缺乏排班管理、患宠档案关联、咨询历史统计

recommended_actions.suggestion: 实时通信复杂度超出 MVP 范围，建议移到 post_launch 或简化为异步消息
添加删除确认对话框和成功 toast 提示
随咨询功能一起推迟到 v2

user_decisions.evidence: Feature moved to errc.eliminate in updated product-concept.json. R2 (宠物医生) role removed.
社区帖子 feature remains in product-concept.json features list. User wants it fixed.
R2 (宠物医生) role removed from product-concept.json. Consistent with deprioritize recommendation.
